arc.headline: Hotel guests leave quiet reviews
arc.brief: Satisfaction is sliding. Not scandalous — yet it's visible to the cohorts who still arrive.

arc.headline: Hospitality Standards Review
arc.brief: A single luxury cohort will decide whether the wing keeps its reputation. Clean, private, quiet — no exceptions.
arc.successCondition: one praised luxury or hospitality cohort visit

arc.headline: Luxury cohorts stop arriving
arc.brief: Movie-star and foreign-prince pools are routing around the tower. Rebuild the reputation before the identity drifts.
arc.successCondition: reach 72 tenant satisfaction AND host 2 praised visits
